title: Clippy pedantic: 45 uninlined_format_args violations
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Cognitive Readability, DRY
**Severity:** NITPICK (pedantic)
**Lint:** clippy::uninlined_format_args
**Count:** 45 occurrences

## Violation
Variables are passed as positional args to format macros (`format!("{}", x)`) instead of being inlined (`format!("{x}")`). Clippy pedantic requires inlined format args for readability and to reduce parameter tracking overhead.

## Locations
- src/compaction.rs: 1187, 1190
- src/hooks/mod.rs: 1066, 1072, 1078, 1084, 1090, 1301, 1306
- src/modes/mod.rs: 630, 635, 640, 645, 650
- src/permissions.rs: 585
- src/plugins/mod.rs: 1068, 1417
- src/prompt.rs: 480, 485
- src/streaming.rs: 377, 388, 399, 419, 432, 459, 495, 526, 548, 653, 677, 725, 774, 838
- src/tools/mod.rs: 1139, 1178, 1492, 1535, 1583, 1634, 1771, 1804, 1824, 1877
- src/tui/mod.rs: 1024 (twice)

## Mandated Refactor
Rewrite every flagged call site to inline the variable:
```rust
// Before
format!("Error: {}", err)
tracing::info!("loaded {}", count);
// After
format!("Error: {err}")
tracing::info!("loaded {count}");
```
Run `cargo clippy --fix --all-targets --all-features -- -W clippy::uninlined_format_args` to auto-apply most of these, then review the diff for correctness (macro calls with side-effects or expressions rather than plain identifiers won't auto-fix).
